scope.name: Project Assets and Source CSS files
scope.pattern: file[SMRC - CraftCMS]:assets//*.css||file[SMRC - CraftCMS]:assets//*.pcss||file[SMRC - CraftCMS]:assets//*.html||file[SMRC - CraftCMS]:assets//*.twig||file[SMRC - CraftCMS]:src//*.css||file[SMRC - CraftCMS]:src//*.pcss||file[SMRC - CraftCMS]:src//*.html||file[SMRC - CraftCMS]:src//*.twig
